name: Makefile Dependency Freshness Check
goal: Auto-install missing Python packages before daemon startup so make run never crashes with ModuleNotFoundError after dependency changes

tasks.name: Add pip install to Makefile run target
tasks.description: Prepend $(PIP) install -qe . to the run target recipe so missing packages are auto-installed before the daemon starts

steps.description: Edit commander/Makefile line 16 to prepend $(PIP) install -qe . && to the run recipe
Verify the change with head -20 commander/Makefile
Verify pip install is a no-op when deps are satisfied
steps.expected: No output, exit code 0, completes in <2 seconds
